title: Cryptography Basics: The Art and Science of Secret Communication
description: Master the fundamental concepts of cryptography - the mathematical foundation that secures our digital world. Understand encryption, decryption, keys, and the core principles that every security system relies upon.
learningObjectives: Define cryptography and distinguish it from related fields like cryptanalysis and steganography
Explain the fundamental goals of cryptography: confidentiality, integrity, authentication, and non-repudiation
Describe the basic components of a cryptographic system
Understand Kerckhoffs's principle and why it matters
Trace the historical evolution from classical to modern cryptography
Recognize why quantum computers pose a threat to current cryptographic systems
